themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And she hath changed my judgments into wickedness more than the nations, and my statutes more...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְחֻקּוֹתַ֖י: and my statutes - a statute".
